title: Sweet Crispy Tofu Monsoon Venezuelan Stir-fry
description: A savory and sweet monsoon-inspired dish featuring crispy tofu with a tangy BBQ sauce, pickled vegetables, and dairy-free cheese for a unique twist on traditional cuisine.

ingredients.name: pickled vegetables
ingredients.notes: use vegan pickles for dairy-free option

instructions: Preheat oven to 400°F (200°C). Line a baking sheet with parchment paper.
Chop the tofu into cubes and season lightly with salt and pepper. Pat dry with paper towels.
Arrange tofu cubes on the prepared baking sheet, drizzle with oil, and bake for about 15 minutes until golden brown.

In a medium pan over medium heat, combine tomato sauce, barbecue sauce, pickled vegetables, chopped onion, minced garlic, and salt and pepper. Simmer for about 5-7 minutes to let flavors meld together.
Remove the tofu from the oven and slice into smaller pieces if needed. Add sliced tofu to the simmering mixture. Stir well until fully combined with the sauce.
Add finely grated dairy-free cheese to the pan, stirring continuously until cheese melts and sauce thickens slightly, about 1-2 minutes more.
Serve warm as a snack or side dish.
